info.title: Sigil.Cli
info.description: CLI tool for signing and verifying software artifacts with distributed trust

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Sign and verify software artifacts with distributed trust

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --version
options.description: Show version information

commands.name: generate
commands.description: Generate a new signing key pair

options.name: -o
options.description: Output file prefix (writes <prefix>.pem and <prefix>.pub.pem)

options.name: --passphrase
options.description: Passphrase to encrypt the private key

options.name: --passphrase-file
options.description: Path to file containing the encryption passphrase

options.name: --algorithm
options.description: Signing algorithm (ecdsa-p256, ecdsa-p384, ecdsa-p521, ed25519, ed448, rsa-pss-sha256, ml-dsa-65)

commands.name: sign
commands.description: Sign an artifact and produce a detached signature envelope

options.name: --key
options.description: Path to a private key PEM file (ephemeral if omitted)

options.name: --output
options.description: Output path for the signature file

options.name: --label
options.description: Label for this signature

options.name: --passphrase
options.description: Passphrase if the signing key is encrypted

options.name: --passphrase-file
options.description: Path to file containing the passphrase

options.name: --algorithm
options.description: Signing algorithm (ephemeral default: ecdsa-p256; also used as hint for encrypted PEM detection)

options.name: --vault
options.description: Vault provider: hashicorp, azure, aws, gcp

options.name: --vault-key
options.description: Vault key reference (format depends on provider)

options.name: --timestamp
options.description: TSA URL for RFC 3161 timestamping

options.name: --keyless
options.description: Use keyless/OIDC signing with ephemeral keys [default: False]

options.name: --oidc-token
options.description: OIDC token for keyless signing (auto-detected from CI if omitted)

options.name: --log-url
options.description: Remote transparency log URL, or 'rekor' for Sigstore public log

options.name: --log-api-key
options.description: API key for Sigil log server (not needed for Rekor)

options.name: --cert-store
options.description: Certificate thumbprint for Windows Certificate Store

options.name: --store-location
options.description: Store location: CurrentUser (default) or LocalMachine

arguments.name: artifact
arguments.description: Path to the artifact to sign

commands.name: verify
commands.description: Verify the signature of an artifact

options.name: --signature
options.description: Path to the signature file (default: <artifact>.sig.json)

options.name: --trust-bundle
options.description: Path to a signed trust bundle for trust evaluation

options.name: --authority
options.description: Expected authority fingerprint for the trust bundle

options.name: --discover
options.description: Discover trust bundle from URI (well-known URL, dns:domain, or git:url)

options.name: --policy
options.description: Path to a policy file for rule-based verification

options.name: --at
options.description: Evaluate trust as of a historical date (ISO 8601, e.g. 2025-06-15 or 2025-06-15T14:30:00Z)

options.name: --anomaly
options.description: Enable anomaly detection after verification [default: False]

options.name: --baseline
options.description: Path to anomaly baseline file (default: <artifact-dir>/.sigil.baseline.json)

arguments.name: artifact
arguments.description: Path to the artifact to verify

commands.name: trust
commands.description: Manage trust bundles

commands.name: create
commands.description: Create a new unsigned trust bundle

options.name: --name
options.description: Name for the trust bundle

options.name: --description
options.description: Description of the trust bundle

options.name: -o
options.description: Output file path (default: <name>.trust.json)

commands.name: add
commands.description: Add a trusted key to a bundle

options.name: --fingerprint
options.description: Key fingerprint (sha256:hex)

options.name: --name
options.description: Display name for the key

options.name: --not-after
options.description: Expiry date (ISO 8601)

options.name: --scope-names
options.description: Allowed name patterns (glob)

options.name: --scope-labels
options.description: Allowed labels

options.name: --scope-algorithms
options.description: Allowed algorithms

commands.name: remove
commands.description: Remove a trusted key from a bundle

options.name: --fingerprint
options.description: Key fingerprint to remove

commands.name: endorse
commands.description: Add an endorsement to a bundle

options.name: --endorser
options.description: Endorser key fingerprint

options.name: --endorsed
options.description: Endorsed key fingerprint

options.name: --statement
options.description: Endorsement statement

options.name: --not-after
options.description: Endorsement expiry (ISO 8601)

options.name: --scope-names
options.description: Allowed name patterns (glob)

options.name: --scope-labels
options.description: Allowed labels

commands.name: sign
commands.description: Sign a trust bundle with an authority key

options.name: --key
options.description: Path to the authority's private key PEM

options.name: -o
options.description: Output path for signed bundle

options.name: --passphrase
options.description: Passphrase if the key is encrypted

options.name: --passphrase-file
options.description: Path to file containing the passphrase

options.name: --algorithm
options.description: Algorithm hint for encrypted PEM detection (ecdsa-p256, ecdsa-p384, ecdsa-p521, rsa-pss-sha256, ml-dsa-65)

options.name: --vault
options.description: Vault provider: hashicorp, azure, aws, gcp

options.name: --vault-key
options.description: Vault key reference (format depends on provider)

options.name: --cert-store
options.description: Certificate thumbprint for Windows Certificate Store

options.name: --store-location
options.description: Store location: CurrentUser (default) or LocalMachine

arguments.name: bundle
arguments.description: Path to the trust bundle to sign

commands.name: show
commands.description: Display the contents of a trust bundle

commands.name: revoke
commands.description: Revoke a key in a trust bundle

options.name: --fingerprint
options.description: Key fingerprint to revoke (sha256:<64 hex chars>)

options.name: --reason
options.description: Reason for revocation (max 1024 chars)

commands.name: identity-add
commands.description: Add a trusted OIDC identity to a bundle

options.name: --issuer
options.description: OIDC issuer URL

options.name: --subject
options.description: Subject pattern (glob)

options.name: --name
options.description: Display name for this identity

options.name: --not-after
options.description: Expiry date (ISO 8601)

commands.name: identity-remove
commands.description: Remove a trusted OIDC identity from a bundle

options.name: --issuer
options.description: OIDC issuer URL

options.name: --subject
options.description: Subject pattern to remove

commands.name: discover
commands.description: Discover trust bundles from well-known URLs, DNS, or git repositories

commands.name: well-known
commands.description: Fetch trust bundle from a well-known URL

options.name: -o
options.description: Save the trust bundle to a file

arguments.description: Domain name or HTTPS URL to fetch trust bundle from

commands.name: dns
commands.description: Look up DNS TXT records for a trust bundle

options.description: Save the trust bundle to a file

arguments.name: domain
arguments.description: Domain name to look up DNS TXT records for

commands.name: git
commands.description: Fetch trust bundle from a git repository

options.name: -o
options.description: Save the trust bundle to a file

arguments.name: url
arguments.description: Git repository URL (use #branch for specific branch/tag)

commands.name: timestamp
commands.description: Apply RFC 3161 timestamp tokens to signature entries

options.name: --tsa
options.description: TSA URL for RFC 3161 timestamping

options.name: --index
options.description: Specific signature index to timestamp (default: all without tokens)

options.description: Expected authority fingerprint for the trust bundle

options.description: Discover trust bundle from URI

commands.name: log
commands.description: Manage transparency log

commands.name: append
commands.description: Append a signing event to the transparency log

options.name: --log
options.description: Path to log file (default: .sigil.log.jsonl)

options.name: --signature-index
options.description: Signature index within envelope (default: 0)

commands.name: verify
commands.description: Verify transparency log integrity

options.name: --log
options.description: Path to log file (default: .sigil.log.jsonl)

options.name: --checkpoint
options.description: Path to checkpoint file

commands.name: search
commands.description: Search transparency log entries

options.name: --log
options.description: Path to log file (default: .sigil.log.jsonl)

options.name: --key
options.description: Search by key fingerprint

options.name: --artifact
options.description: Search by artifact name

options.name: --digest
options.description: Search by signature or artifact digest

commands.name: show
commands.description: Display transparency log entries

options.name: --log
options.description: Path to log file (default: .sigil.log.jsonl)

options.name: --limit
options.description: Maximum number of entries to show

options.name: --offset
options.description: Number of entries to skip

commands.name: proof
commands.description: Generate inclusion or consistency proof

options.name: --log
options.description: Path to log file (default: .sigil.log.jsonl)

options.name: --index
options.description: Leaf index for inclusion proof

options.name: --old-size
options.description: Old tree size for consistency proof

options.description: Set git config globally (also enables commit.gpgsign) [default: False]

options.name: --passphrase

options.name: --passphrase-file
options.description: Path to file containing the passphrase

options.description: Vault provider (hashicorp, azure, aws, gcp, pkcs11)

options.description: Key reference in the vault provider

options.description: Certificate thumbprint for Windows Certificate Store

options.name: --store-location
options.description: Store location: CurrentUser (default) or LocalMachine

commands.name: credential
commands.description: Manage stored passphrases in Windows Credential Manager

commands.name: store
commands.description: Store a passphrase for a key in Windows Credential Manager

options.name: --key
options.description: Path to the private key file

commands.name: remove
commands.description: Remove a stored passphrase from Windows Credential Manager

options.name: --key
options.description: Path to the private key file

commands.name: list
commands.description: List keys with stored passphrases in Windows Credential Manager

commands.name: graph
commands.description: Build and query trust graphs

commands.name: build
commands.description: Build a trust graph from artifacts in a directory

options.name: --scan
options.description: Directory to scan for signature envelopes, trust bundles, and attestations

options.name: --output
options.description: Output file path for the graph (default: graph.json)

commands.name: query
commands.description: Query a trust graph

options.name: --graph
options.description: Path to graph.json file

options.name: --key
options.description: Key fingerprint for queries

options.name: --artifact
options.description: Artifact name for queries

options.name: --from
options.description: Start node ID for path query

options.name: --to
options.description: End node ID for path query

options.name: --reach
options.description: Find all reachable nodes from key [default: False]

options.name: --chain
options.description: Show trust chain for artifact [default: False]

options.name: --signed-by
options.description: Show artifacts signed by key [default: False]

options.name: --revoked
options.description: Analyze revoked key impact [default: False]

options.name: --impact
options.description: Show impact analysis (use with --revoked) [default: False]

options.name: --path
options.description: Find shortest path between nodes [default: False]

commands.name: export
commands.description: Export a trust graph in DOT or JSON format

options.name: --graph
options.description: Path to graph.json file

options.name: --format
options.description: Export format: dot or json

options.name: --output
options.description: Output file path (default: stdout)

commands.name: impact
commands.description: Analyze the impact of a key compromise

options.name: --fingerprint
options.description: Key fingerprint to analyze (sha256:...)

options.name: --key
options.description: PEM file path — compute fingerprint from SPKI

options.name: --scan
options.description: Directory to scan for building the graph

options.name: --graph
options.description: Path to pre-built graph.json file

options.name: --format
options.description: Output format: text or json (default: text)

options.name: --output
options.description: Write output to file instead of stdout

commands.name: baseline
commands.description: Manage anomaly detection baselines

commands.name: learn
commands.description: Learn signing patterns from existing signatures

options.name: --scan
options.description: Directory with *.sig.json files to learn from

options.name: --output
options.description: Output path for baseline file (default: <scan-dir>/.sigil.baseline.json)
